name: Pickled Meats
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt, spices, sugar, and minced garlic together thoroughly.
2. Rub the mixture into the meat evenly.
3. Place the meat in a pan, cover well, and refrigerate. Turn the meat once a week or more.
4. To cook, place the meat in cold water and bring to a boil.
5. Discard the first water and replace with fresh cold water.
6. Bring the water back to a boil and reduce the heat to gently simmer until tender.
